intro.title: Capacity & Lead Time
intro.description: Lead time is where many sourcing projects fail. Our goal is to make timelines predictable - by confirming specs early, controlling revisions, and planning production to match your launch schedule.
intro.promiseText: We don't over-promise. You get a realistic schedule based on current line capacity and material availability.

items.label: Customization depth
items.text: Logo only (fast) vs structure changes (requires tooling).

whatWeProvide.title: What We Can Provide
items: Mass production schedule aligned to your PO and forecast
Replenishment plan suggestions for repeat orders

estimates.title: Standard Estimates
estimates.note: * Estimates vary based on project complexity and customization.

primary.title: Request a Lead-Time Plan
primary.description: Tell us your target market, application, and order quantity. We respond within 24 hours with a practical schedule and next steps.

secondary.title: Start with a Pilot Order
secondary.description: Verify read performance and durability before you scale. Stock samples or branded samples are both available.
